title: Hexbus
description: Opinionated CLI framework packages for Inth apps. The monorepo keeps Inth app CLIs focused on app behavior while sharing the command-line framework, codemod runner, and agent skill installer glue.
features: `hexbus` provides typed CLI context, argument parsing, logging, prompts, help output, error handling, telemetry hooks, project detection, and update hints.
`@inth/hexbus-codemods` provides a reusable `ts-morph` codemod harness with dry-run support, version gating, and fixture helpers.
`@inth/hexbus-skills` wraps the external `skills` CLI so Inth app CLIs can install agent skill bundles through the caller's package manager.
Bun-first workspace scripts delegate through Turbo while package-specific tasks live in each package.
Packages stay product-agnostic so downstream CLIs can compose shared mechanics without inheriting product copy or dependencies.
prerequisites: Git, for Changesets and workspace development
quickStart:
Install dependencies, then run the normal verification tasks from the workspace root:

```bash
bun install
bun run build
bun run test
bun run check-types
```

Try the minimal example CLI when you want to see the `hexbus` chassis in motion:

```bash
bun --cwd examples/minimal-cli run dev --help
```
usage: Use the root scripts for workspace-wide checks. They delegate to Turbo and run the matching package scripts.

```bash
bun run build
bun run lint
bun run test
bun run check-types
```
Work inside a package when you need package-specific development commands.

```bash
bun --cwd packages/hexbus run dev
bun --cwd packages/codemods run test
bun --cwd packages/skills run lint
```
Publishable changes should include a Changeset before release.

commands.name: bun run build
commands.description: Build every workspace package through Turbo.

commands.name: bun run test
commands.description: Run package test suites through Turbo.

commands.name: bun run check-types
commands.description: Run TypeScript type checks across the workspace.

commands.name: bun run fmt
commands.description: Format and fix supported files with each package's formatter task.

commands.name: bun run changeset
commands.description: Create a release note for publishable package changes.

customSections.Packages:
- [`hexbus`](packages/hexbus): opinionated CLI framework primitives for Inth apps.
- [`@inth/hexbus-codemods`](packages/codemods): reusable codemod runner and test utilities.
- [`@inth/hexbus-skills`](packages/skills): small skill installer helper for invoking `skills add`.
customSections.Example:
The `examples/minimal-cli` package demonstrates a tiny CLI built on top of `hexbus`.

```bash
bun --cwd examples/minimal-cli run dev --help
```
customSections.Release Workflow:
This repo uses Changesets for package versions and release notes.

```bash
bun run changeset
bun run version
bun run release
```

Run verification before publishing:

```bash
bun run build
bun run test
bun run check-types
```
customSections.Design Goals:
- Keep Inth app CLIs responsible for app-specific commands, constants, auth, control-plane calls, and transforms.
- Keep shared Hexbus packages free of app-specific imports and copy.
- Prefer small explicit APIs over broad abstractions.
- Make package behavior easy to test in isolation.

contributing: Use Bun for installs, scripts, tests, and one-off TypeScript execution.
Keep root scripts as `turbo run` delegators.
Put package-specific task logic in each package's `package.json`.
Add or update tests for behavior changes.
